prompt:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the outfit and accessory reference, create a cinematic dark-gothic portrait of a young man wearing the same black-and-deep-purple aristocratic gothic clothing: the decorated hat, long embroidered coat, ornate vest, choker, gloves, fitted pants, and tall lace-up boots. Transform the reference-sheet presentation into a dramatic seated scene: the character sits on an oversized ornate black leather throne, legs crossed, leaning back with a confident intimidating aura, one gloved hand lowering small black sunglasses to look directly at the viewer. Keep the outfit’s purple jewel accents, lace, embroidery, chains, and metal ornamentation faithful to the reference, but adapt the fit naturally to the new character.

Scene and mood: place the character in a dim Victorian gothic room with dark curtains, carved gilded wood details, and very low warm candlelike side lighting. Use high-contrast cinematic lighting, deep shadows, realistic textures, glossy black leather, subtle purple highlights, and a powerful elegant villain-like atmosphere.

Composition: vertical portrait, waist-to-boots visible, throne filling the background, centered character, dramatic close perspective. No reference-sheet labels, no Japanese text, no design-document layout, no extra characters.
